title.zh: 苏德互不侵犯条约签订

description.zh: 苏联与纳粹德国签署互不侵犯条约，秘密议定书划分了东欧势力范围，为德国入侵波兰扫清了障碍。
description.en: The Soviet Union and Nazi Germany signed a non-aggression pact with secret protocols dividing Eastern Europe into spheres of influence, clearing the path for Germany's invasion of Poland.

title.zh: 德国入侵波兰，第二次世界大战爆发
title.en: Germany Invades Poland — World War II Begins

description.zh: 1939年9月1日，纳粹德国以闪电战入侵波兰，英法随后对德宣战，第二次世界大战全面爆发。
description.en: On September 1, 1939, Nazi Germany launched a blitzkrieg invasion of Poland. Britain and France declared war on Germany two days later, marking the start of World War II in Europe.
